Manual.title: User Manual
Manual.description: Welcome to your ultimate guide to using PyuNovel. Find everything you need to start your reading journey here.

auth.title: 1. Authentication
auth.step1: Click "Sign In" on the Navbar or Profile Menu.
auth.step2: If you don't have an account, click "Sign up" and provide your name, email, and password.
auth.step3: If you already have an account, enter your credentials and click "Sign In".

reading.title: 2. Browsing & Reading
reading.browsing: Explore novels through the Home page or Ranking lists.
reading.steps: Click a novel cover and tap "📖 Read Now" to begin.

mobile.nav: Easy Navigation - Use the blue Prev, Contents, Next buttons at the bottom.
mobile.toc: TOC Sidebar - Tap Contents to open the sidebar and switch chapters easily.
mobile.comment: Paragraph Comment - Tap the 💬 icon next to paragraphs to leave specific feedback.

desktop.nav: Navigation - Use the Prev, Contents, Next buttons at the bottom.
desktop.toc: Table of Contents - Tapping Contents takes you back to the Chapters Tab.
desktop.wide: Wide View - Enjoy a broader reading experience on Desktop.

collection.title: 3. My Collection
collection.desc: Save novels with the "🔖 Collect" button. Access them anytime from the "Collection" menu.

daily.title: 4. Daily Rewards
daily.step1: Go to your Profile and click "Daily Check-in".
daily.step2: Earn EXP to level up. Frequent check-ins lead to faster level progression.

create.title: How to Create a New Novel
steps: Click the "Create" button on the Navbar.
Once on the Author Dashboard, click the "+ New Novel" button.
Fill in the Novel Title and URL Slug (English only).
Add Genres (Tags) separated by commas.
Write a Synopsis and upload a Cover Image.
Click "Create Novel" to publish your project.

edit.title: How to Edit Novel Details
steps: Go to your novel's detail page.
Click "✏️ Edit Novel" from the menu.
Make your changes and click "Save Changes".

delete.title: How to Delete a Novel
steps: Click "🗑️ Delete" from the novel's menu.
Confirm the deletion. Warning: This will remove all chapters and cannot be undone.

add.title: How to Add a New Chapter
steps: Click the "✍️ Add Chapter" button on your novel page.
Create a Volume first using "+ Add New Volume" if needed.
Enter the Chapter Title and paste your content.
Click "Publish" to make it live for readers.

edit.title: How to Edit Existing Chapters
steps: Navigate to the Chapters Tab on your novel page.
Click the pencil icon (✏️) next to the chapter.
Update the content and click "Save Changes".

delete.title: How to Delete a Chapter
steps: Click the trash icon (🗑️) next to the chapter in the list.
Confirm deletion to permanently remove the content.

telegram.title: 6. Telegram Integration
telegram.step1: Go to Integration and generate a Connection Code.
telegram.step2: Send the code to our Telegram Bot to publish chapters directly from Telegram.

Manual.footerNote: Need help? Contact us via "Report Issue"!
